preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

featureFlags._doc: Runtime feature flags read at Electron startup. Do NOT rely on these for security-critical defaults — a stale version.json on an offline client stays at the shipped values. Security-critical changes must land as code pushes with a version bump.

notes: v1.22.3: Hyper-performant archive + post-audit polish. Anchor: 2026-05-13. ARCHIVE PERF (RSI iter 1 — the centerpiece): five root-cause fixes targeting the archive + adjacent IPC hot paths flagged by a deep parallel performance audit. (1) In-memory walk cache in archive-scanner.js — scanArchive() returns the previous walk's items instantly when the watcher hasn't fired since; the watcher's onChange now calls invalidateScanCache() so file changes still trigger a fresh walk. Archive open drops from 400-800ms cold (200-500ms walk + 50-200ms get-live-ads + 100-200ms render) to <10ms on warm cache, ~50ms cold. (2) get-live-ads handler converted sync → async + parallel per-brand reads via Promise.all + LRU cache keyed by mtimeMs+size (cap 64 brands). 10-brand workspace all-brands view drops from 120-230ms main-thread block to ~20-30ms. (3) archive-changed broadcast now carries { paths, truncated } payload (capped at 200 entries) so the renderer can support incremental updates; bare fallback kept for back-compat. (4) Archive build loop converted from items.forEach + grid.appendChild × N → DocumentFragment batched first chunk (300 cards sync) + idle-time tail in 200-card chunks via requestIdleCallback. Initial paint on a 5000-asset brand drops from 200-500ms to ~30ms; the rest fills during idle frames; the existing isStale() race guard short-circuits stale idle callbacks. (5) get-activity-feed-full handler accepts an optional limit param (default 2000, max 50000) so the renderer no longer triggers a 300-850ms sync JSONL parse on the main process every search-all. RENDERER POLISH (RSI iter 2-3): approval countdown setInterval(1000)×900 ticks replaced with a two-phase setTimeout chain (Phase 1 sleeps until the warning window; Phase 2 ticks once per second only while the final 60s are on screen — eliminates 840 wasted wakeups per modal). Wisdom cards Math.max(...arr.map(...)) × 5 collapsed into a single-pass maxVal() helper called once per array. Connection-status NodeList captured-once and reused across pre-paint / safety-timer / resolved branches (was: 3× querySelectorAll per brand change). EMQ AUDIT (PR #185): meta_audit MCP tool gains audit-events action for per-event Event Match Quality scores (mirrors Events Manager → Data Sources EMQ column). Pixel detail call no longer requests the deprecated server_events_match_rate field (was returning HTTP 400 and tanking every audit-pixel call). Stats endpoint switched to explicit Unix start/end timestamps (Meta deprecated -7d relative shortcut). Plain-English findings: each event gets a Great (≥8) / Good (≥6) / Low (<6) grade with actionable fix advice (Low Purchase EMQ → 'Match quality is low — turn on Automatic Advanced Matching, verify CAPI sends hashed email + phone'). COPY-BTN FIX (PR #258): inline copy buttons next to <code> blocks now show a visible 'Copied!' toast on success and 'Copy failed' on failure (was: silent 12px button-glyph swap with no .catch() — clicks looked like no-ops). Falls back to Electron's native clipboard via merlin.copyText when navigator.clipboard rejects (Electron unfocused-window / strict origin policy). GO BINARY (RSI iter 3-4): four data-pulling handlers gained CLAUDE.md Dedup Contract declarations (runSEOCluster intentional non-dedup with 5k-query revisit threshold; runMetaAuditRetargetingCascade + runMetaAuditPixel live state check; pickRevenueSource intentional non-dedup with cross-pollution justification). New dedup_contract_test.go source-scans for the strategy markers so a future strip trips the build. TEST COVERAGE: 6 new copy-button tests, 12 new EMQ + time-window tests, 10 new archive-scanner cache tests (including 4 new tests verifying the in-memory cache contract + watcher invalidation flow), 8 new RSI iter 1 regression tests in renderer.test.js, 3 new RSI iter 2-3 polish tests, 1 new Go dedup-contract regression test. All 1190 autoCMO tests + full Go merlin/facts/factverify suite pass. EXPECTED USER-VISIBLE IMPACT: archive opens feel instant (~40-80× faster on warm cache, 8-16× cold). Live Ads tab paints 4-10× faster. Activity-feed search-all 6-17× faster. Generation-burst archive flicker eliminated (100-file write that used to cascade 5 reloads over 1.5-4 seconds now coalesces to 1 reload after burst settles). Copy buttons actually copy AND tell you they did.

9:16" silently coerced to the Feed-default (4:5 + 1:1) because neither the primary-aspect map nor the formats switch in runImagePipeline recognized the token. Single canonicalImageFormat alias-fold switch now handles portrait/4:5, square/1:1, story/9:16/vertical/reel/reels, landscape/16:9, both (default), all. Unknown tokens log a warning and fall back to "both" rather than silently coercing. ARCHIVE SCROLL PERSISTENCE: pre-fix alt-tab away from Merlin with the archive sidebar open caused the panel to snap to the top on return. Root cause: fs.watch events queued while unfocused fired on focus regain, the archive-changed IPC triggered loadArchive(), which did innerHTML wipe and rebuilt. New MutationObserver pattern captures scrollTop before the wipe and restores it after cards land + double rAF for layout. Filter-button / search / refresh-button paths reset to top (correct UX for explicit content change). 2026-05-12 follow-up: user within 100px of the bottom auto-snaps to the new bottom on reload (Slack/iMessage convention) so new content arriving while the user is at the tail gets pushed into view rather than missed. MAILCHIMP INTEGRATION (20 actions, full Klaviyo parity): Marketing API key auth (no OAuth — private API keys cover every scope today), tile in #brand-tiles, Slack/Discord tiles visually grouped into the brand section. Action surface: status / audiences / campaigns / performance (read), templates list/get/create/update/delete/bulk-upload, campaigns create/set-content/send-test/send/schedule/delete, automations list/emails/pause/start. CheckMailchimpCampaignCANSPAM gates every send + schedule (5 rules: missing subject/from_name/reply_to/UNSUB-tag/physical-address). applyMailchimpMergeTags swaps the same generic placeholders Klaviyo accepts so the same source HTML works on either platform. POST-AUDIT SECURITY HARDENING (5 fixes): (1) P0 path-traversal in mailchimp-templates-bulk-upload — cmd.Dir now routed through validateBulkUploadDir (filepath.Abs + EvalSymlinks + Rel containment + dot-dot reject); (2) P0 Bash approval-bypass — new BASH_CARDED_DESTRUCTIVE set in main.js parallels the MCP CARDED_DESTRUCTIVE_ACTIONS tier so mailchimp-campaign-send/schedule/automation-pause/start fire an approval card on both the MCP and Bash routes; (3) HIGH Mailchimp token redaction gap — new word-boundary-anchored 32-hex-dash-dc pattern in both Go and JS redactors covers Mailchimp keys (35-37 chars, missed by the existing 40+-char opaque sweep); (4) HIGH CAN-SPAM physical-address heuristic-bypass — tightened from 2-of-N keywords to 3-of-N clustered within 200 chars; (5) MEDIUM strconv.Atoi replaces fmt.Sscanf in runMailchimpCampaignSetContent. UX POLISH (post-audit, 7 items): Mailchimp API-key URL switched to login.mailchimp.com (auto-routes to user datacenter); CAN-SPAM error messages rewritten for the 5th-grader test (no legal-cite jargon, no internal field names, recovery hints included); approval card labels for 12 Mailchimp destructive actions are sentence-level on both Bash and MCP paths (Send this email campaign to your Mailchimp audience not mailchimp-campaign-send); archive follow-new-content convention; pagination on every list-style Mailchimp runner (templates / campaigns / automations) with offset + short-page terminator; empty-state copy rewritten for the 5th-grader test. NEW APPROVAL TIER: CARDED_DESTRUCTIVE_ACTIONS sits between READ_ONLY_ACTIONS (auto-approve) and SPEND_ACTIONS (card with budget context). For destructive non-spend writes that touch live customer-facing state (email blasts, workflow pause/resume), the new tier shows a generic confirmation card with no budget context. Pre-fix these actions auto-approved under the catch-all — a compliant email blast to the WRONG audience is still a fire-the-CEO event regardless of CAN-SPAM passing. TEST COVERAGE: 14 new security tests in mailchimp_security_test.go, 11 new polish tests in mailchimp_polish_test.go, regression guards for path traversal, bash bypass, Mailchimp redaction (Go + JS), CAN-SPAM 3-of-N clustering, strconv.Atoi rejection, pagination two-page aggregation, CAN-SPAM copy quality (no banned substrings + recovery hint), template name-only/html-only update, delete/automation 200 vs 204 path, summarize empty/empty-JSON. All 1173 autoCMO tests + Go merlin/facts/factverify all pass.
whatsNew: Archive sidebar feels instant — opens in <50ms (was 400-800ms), scroll stays at 60fps on 5000+ assets
Live Ads + activity feed paint 4-17× faster; generation-run flicker is gone
Meta audit-events: see your per-event match quality (EMQ) right in chat — Great / Good / Low grade + plain-English fix advice
Copy buttons actually copy now — visible 'Copied!' toast on every click, with Electron clipboard fallback
Inline pixel diagnostics no longer 400 on Meta's deprecated server_events_match_rate field
